data.bearish_scenario: Worse than expected → negative market reaction likely.

data.title: Unemployment Claims
data.bullish_scenario: Lower unemployment → strong labor market. Mixed — could mean Fed stays tight.
data.bearish_scenario: Higher unemployment → economic weakness. Risk-off initially.

data.title: FOMC Member Jefferson Speaks
data.bullish_scenario: Dovish tone or rate cut → liquidity injection. Risk-on. BTC and equities rally.
data.bearish_scenario: Hawkish surprise or rate hike → tightening. Risk-off selloff across crypto and equities.

data.bullish_scenario: Better than expected → positive market reaction likely.
data.bearish_scenario: Worse than expected → negative market reaction likely.

data.title: Retail Sales m/m
data.bullish_scenario: Strong retail sales → consumer spending healthy. Risk-on, equities benefit.
data.bearish_scenario: Weak retail sales → consumer slowdown. Recession fears, risk-off.

data.title: Spanish Flash CPI y/y
data.bullish_scenario: CPI below forecast → disinflation. Rate cut hopes boost risk assets. BTC bullish.
data.bearish_scenario: CPI above forecast → inflation sticky. Fed stays hawkish. Risk-off, BTC dumps.
